tests.key: service_worker.js › loads and registers chrome event listeners on import
service_worker.js › central › is a no-op
service_worker.js › getUrlKey › prefixes with url- and strips the fragment
service_worker.js › validTab › accepts http and https tabs
service_worker.js › validTab › rejects empty and internal-scheme tabs
service_worker.js › parseTabId › parses the numeric id from a tabKey
service_worker.js › updateTotals › sums process metrics into processTotals
service_worker.js › updateTotals › defaults missing metrics to 0
service_worker.js › urlUpdates › initializes processes and copies title/favicon/groupId
service_worker.js › urlUpdates › accumulates process stats when a process is supplied
service_worker.js › urlUpdates › uses the url as title when title is missing
service_worker.js › update › persists updates to chrome.storage.local
service_worker.js › getLocalStorage › invokes the callback with the storage result
service_worker.js › getLocalStorage › resolves with the result when no callback is passed
service_worker.js › getTabGroup › resolves null for id -1 or null
service_worker.js › getTabGroup › resolves the group for a real id
service_worker.js › trackGroup › stores the group title by id
service_worker.js › listenToProcesses › registers the processes listener
service_worker.js › listenToProcesses › does not throw when the processes API throws
service_worker.js › closeUrl › reorders allUrls, persists, and invokes the callback
service_worker.js › newUrl › returns early without tabId/url
service_worker.js › newUrl › prepends an unseen url key to allUrls
service_worker.js › updateActiveTabs › queries tabs and persists the rebuilt active list
service_worker.js › processProcesses › bumps samples and persists process totals
service_worker.js › associateProcess › fetches each task tab and merges its url updates
service_worker.js › tabUpdates › resolves {} for an invalid tab
service_worker.js › tabUpdates › resolves keyed url updates for a valid tab
service_worker.js › handleActiveTabsGroupChanges › no-ops when oldValue is missing
service_worker.js › groupTabs › ungroups an unlabeled grouped tab
service_worker.js › groupTabs › ignores pinned tabs
popup.js › truncateString › returns "" for empty/undefined input
popup.js › truncateString › leaves short strings unchanged
popup.js › truncateString › truncates long strings with an ellipsis
popup.js › urlHTML › renders title + favicon and no stats when samples is 0
popup.js › urlHTML › renders an averaged stats block when there are samples
popup.js › urlHTML › truncates long titles via truncateString
popup.js › init › activates an existing TabCommand tab
popup.js › init › creates a pinned tab when none exists
popup.js › loadActiveTabs › renders a div per active tab
App › renders the logo and zero seed counts when storage is empty
App › shows non-zero counts when storage is seeded
Chrome › hydrates labels/uxSettings/autoClosed to {} when absent
Chrome › hydrates activeTabs/allUrls/previousLabels to [] when absent
Chrome › supports a single string key
Chrome › passes through requested keys that are present
Chrome › strips timestamp and drops falsy previousLabels entries
Chrome › set delegates to chrome.storage.local.set
Chrome › remove delegates to chrome.storage.local.remove
chromeShim › hydrates the store from seeded localStorage
chromeShim › get supports string, array, and all forms
chromeShim › ignores malformed seed values
chromeShim › set mirrors to localStorage and fires onChanged with areaName local
chromeShim › remove clears the key and fires onChanged with the old value
chromeShim › removeListener stops delivering change events
chromeShim › exposes callable no-op action stubs
chromeShim › is inert when a real chrome.storage.local is present
chromeShim › shares the known TabCommand storage keys
